title: Admin Is Intimacy
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the weight of financial paperwork
excerpt: A short energy statement for when financial admin feels like a burden. The release clears the dread that builds around forms and filing; the allow opens to paperwork as a form of attentiveness to the money you're building.
sourceNotes: The release-and-allow structure is drawn from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for Day 53 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use before sitting down with any financial task you've been avoiding.

content.text: A two-minute energy statement for before a financial admin session. The release clears the resistance that builds between you and the pile of admin; the allow reframes the task as part of a close relationship with your money.
I am ready to release all dread, procrastination, and heaviness around financial admin. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow financial admin that feels light, clear, and like an act of care for the money I am building. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
The release-and-allow structure comes from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for Day 53 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
